title: KP totems
description: A simple set of resources that adds the ability to change the appearance of totems.
body:
# For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn

## All totems added in this resource pack:

![All totems added in this resource pack:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8ed40a2fd899d7e6773c65480f1a5f95c3452b7.png)
#
